---
title: "Causal Atoms: Pilot Notes"
date: 2026-05-04
categories:
  - draft
  - causal atoms
---

Draft / working note.

## Motivation

- TODO: Add motivation.

## Experimental Setup

- TODO: Add experimental setup.

## Baselines

- TODO: Add baselines.

## Pilot Diagnostics

- TODO: Add pilot diagnostics.

## Current Interpretation

- TODO: Add current interpretation.

## Limitations

- TODO: Add limitations.

## Next Steps

- TODO: Add next steps.
